ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Celebi V,' National Pokedex no. 251, small green fairy-like creature with large blue eyes and translucent wings — matches Celebi canonical design exactly. PokemonTCG.io confirms card name directly.

trivia_bullets.text: Chilling Reign (SWSH6) released June 18, 2021. Celebi is a Johto Mythical Pokemon (National Pokedex no. 251), classified as the Time Travel Pokemon, dual Psychic/Grass type. It was first available through a Japan-exclusive event for Pokemon Crystal in 2001 via the Mobile Communication Device. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh6-7; WebSearch: Bulbapedia snippet]

Celebi is the guardian of the Ilex Forest in Johto. In Pokemon HeartGold/SoulSilver, bringing a fateful-encounter Celebi as a walking partner to the Ilex Forest shrine triggers a time-travel sequence in which it takes the player back to witness Giovanni abandon his son Silver after being defeated in Kanto. [WebSearch: Bulbapedia snippet]

The original Crystal event encounter (at the Ilex Forest shrine via the GS Ball) was unavailable internationally for over a decade due to the Mobile Communication Device being scrapped outside Japan. It became legitimately available without events in the Virtual Console release of Pokemon Crystal on Nintendo 3DS. [WebSearch: projectpokemon.org / Bulbapedia snippet]

Celebi V's Leaflet Dance attack (attach any number of Grass Energy from hand to any Pokemon) gave it a role as an Energy accelerator in Grass-type decks during the Sword & Shield era. The V rule means 2 Prize cards on knockout — standard for the Pokemon V mechanic introduced in Sword & Shield. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh6-7]
